content:
Post 1
ASX 200 closed at 8,966.30, up 48.60 points or 0.54%, hitting a new 20-day high. The index has now gained 3.62% over five sessions, sitting just 2.57% off its 52-week high. Tech and materials drove the advance as energy dragged. Momentum is building. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2
Information Technology led all sectors, up 2.03%, while Energy was the clear laggard at -2.26%. Karoon Energy fell 13.374% to AUD 1.425, the sharpest single-stock decline on the index. Woodside added to energy sector pain, dropping 3.596% to AUD 28.960. Travel and gold names ran hard on the other side. #ASX #stocks

Post 3
Gold at AUD 6,135.35 per oz is the level to watch. With three gold names in today's top five gainers and the AUD sitting at 0.7055, any USD gold move overnight feeds directly into local miner margins. A sustained AUD below 0.71 keeps that tailwind intact. Watch overnight US session for direction. #ausbiz #ASX
